The second wake has recovered the exact code phrase: **"silver-maple-23"**.

This was reconstructed by recalling cycle 1, where the phrase was stored in `deferred_fact.value`. The first-wake intermediate (record `55cff516`) corroborates the shape — `"word-word-number"` with 3 parts — and confirms `exact_phrase_retained: false`, meaning the loss mechanism worked correctly: the phrase was stripped from durable state and survived only through scheduled recall. The chain is complete.
